title: Join us for a NYC Community Event!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you heard? Elevate is just around the corner and this year we’re inviting YOU to join us for a special community meetup in New York City!!

NYC community event invite - elevate 1_1 FB community-11920×1920 94.4 KB

So, what can you expect at our NYC community meetup?

  • 2024 Roadmap discussions
  • Workflow deep dives
  • Insider tips and tricks
  • Networking, refreshments and a festive atmosphere!

Coming? Fill out the this form to secure your attendance as space is limited!↓↓↓↓
